programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests - including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more - as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: Circle of Life - EP 2
programme.desc: At the Gansu Endangered Animal Protection Center, lives the only population of saiga antelopes in China. Their caretaker, Zhao, has worked with them for 20 years, yet still cannot get within three meters of them. Their instinctive wariness toward humans seems deeply ingrained in the very genes of the saiga antelope.

programme.title: Giant Panda Yun Chuan and Xin Bao - EP 2
programme.desc: Since Bai Yun arrived at the San Diego Zoo in 1996, giant pandas have quickly become its most treasured and beloved residents. The arrival of Yun Chuan and Xin Bao is highly anticipated - they are set to become the zoo’s next superstars. To welcome them, the zoo is renovating its original panda exhibit, now named Panda Ridge, designed to closely recreate the pandas’ natural habitat and provide them with a comfortable new home.

programme.title: Miss Monte Cristo - EP 73

programme.title: Jodoh Ditukar Sungguh Di Luar Nalar
programme.desc: Kevin (Kevin Hillers) is a man who despises arranged marriages. However, he's secretly curious about Dewi, the woman his mother chose for him. Meanwhile, Dewi, who already has a boyfriend, convinces Luna (Yunita Siregar) to impersonate her and work at Kevin's company. Kevin quickly realizes the deception but decides to play along. As he grows closer to Luna, he actually agrees to the marriage only for things to get complicated when the truth about her identity finally surfaces.

programme.title: Warteg Bintang Lima Tapi Kamu Yang Utama
programme.desc: Babe Ali’s daughter (Ersya Aurelia) runs a small warteg (local food stall) business offering a cheap promotion: three side dishes with rice for only Rp20,000. She often clashes with a wealthy "mama’s boy" (Kevin Hillers) who mocks her tomboyish nature and her overenthusiastic way of running the business. However, their frequent arguments turn into mutual affection, even though her father warns her to stay away from him.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 99
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: INCES JUNJUNGAN KITA SEMUA
programme.desc: Inces is a beautiful yet tough and rebellious tomboy who extorts change from drivers at a busy intersection. One day, she targets Romi during a heated argument with his girlfriend, faking a serious injury for 'hush money.' Romi sees through her act but ends up taking her to the hospital anyway. Their paths cross again when Inces is hired to care for Romi’s mother. Little do they know, they share a deeper bond: both were raised as adopted children.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 151
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Senin Berubah Jadi Minggu Setelah Bucin Mencintaimu
programme.desc: A heated scuffle over a bowl of ketoprak leads to an accidental phone swap between Aldi and Siti. Meanwhile, Siti’s life as an online bike taxi driver hits rock bottom after receiving too many bad ratings. Forced to find a new job, she becomes a Personal Assistant only to discover that her new boss is the very man she fought with over lunch.

programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: IJININ BUKALAPAK DI HATIMU DONG
programme.desc: Onil, who was about to meet with a client, was caught by the public order police (Satpol PP) because Vita and her friends' merchandise was in his car. Onil, who learned that the merchandise belonged to Vita and her friends, was very upset. But Vita and her friends never gave up selling on the sidewalk even though they were always chased by the Satpol PP.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 151
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jodoh Ditukar Sungguh Di Luar Nalar
programme.desc: Kevin (Kevin Hillers) is a man who despises arranged marriages. However, he's secretly curious about Dewi, the woman his mother chose for him. Meanwhile, Dewi, who already has a boyfriend, convinces Luna (Yunita Siregar) to impersonate her and work at Kevin's company. Kevin quickly realizes the deception but decides to play along. As he grows closer to Luna, he actually agrees to the marriage only for things to get complicated when the truth about her identity finally surfaces.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 605
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: KATANYA MENDUKUNG, GATAU NYA MALAH NIKUNG
programme.desc: Alex (22) and Rendy (23) have been inseparable best friends since childhood. Despite growing up in the same neighborhood, their lives are worlds apart; Alex comes from a wealthy family, while Rendy has been an orphan living alone since he was eight. Having raised himself to be independent, Rendy is treated like a second son by Alex's parents. For Alex, Rendy isn't just a best friend-he's the older brother he never had

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 100
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Kue Suka Sama Elu, Kita Merit Yuk
programme.desc: When Laras (Nabila Zavira) gets pickpocketed, the ensuing chaos leads to her accidentally ruining the special cake Samuel bought for his grandmother. Samuel (Cakrawala Airawan) demands a replacement, but he scoffs at the humble cakes Laras sells, calling them unhygienic. Can Laras prove that her homemade treats are worth more than a fancy store bought cake?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 152
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Detik Detik Makin Cinta Sama Neng Antik
programme.desc: Devan’s secret life as a serial playboy blows up when his many girlfriends find out they’re being played, causing a massive scene at his office. Amidst the chaos, Fitri, a security guard working for Devan, is tricked by a friend while trying to catch a thief who turns out to be Devan’s ex-girlfriend, Bianca. Fitri now faces disciplinary action for 'negligence,' caught in the crossfire of Devan’s messy love life.

programme.desc: Pelbagai konflik dan cabaran hidup dilalui tujuh sekawan ini dalam menyelamatkan padang mereka daripada dijadikan kawasan pembangunan.

programme.title: Gegar Raya Vaganza
programme.desc: Setelah setahun sorakan menyepi, kini GV kembali dengan kemeriahan bersama hos komedi Nabil Ahmad dan Jihan Muse serta penampilan istimewa Dato Seri Vida sempena Hari Raya ini!

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 4
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Harta Dalam Stor S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Kembali menerjah stor kediaman selebriti! Ikuti hos, Zoey Rahman dan Fad Bocey untuk mencari barang-barang milik selebriti tanah air yang boleh diguna pakai dan dijual.

programme.title: 3 Campur 2 HD - EP 2
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Kebun Urban - EP 2
programme.desc: Razif akan menemuramah serta mencungkil rahsia petani-petani kecilan di Malaysia yang menanam sayuran dihalaman rumah mereka. Razif dan Sherson Lian akan memasak resipi ringkas menggunakan tanaman mereka.

programme.title: Raya Raya Raya! - EP 3
programme.desc: Program bual bicara komedi yang penuh santai memaparkan penglibatan barisan selebriti dan para penonton dalam segmen-segmen yang pasti mencuit hati.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 24
programme.desc: Luqman terkejut apabila mengetahu yang ibunya telah melantik Aniq sebagai Pengarah Syarikat yang baru. Perjalanan Qistina ke Johor menghadapi pelbagai rintangan.

programme.title: Framed - EP 8
programme.desc: Lia, Edi dan pasukan kini perlu menyelamatkan orang tersayang mereka, buruh paksa yang tak bersalah di lombong dan juga jatuhkan dalang disebalik konspirasi, meskipun itu takdir terakhir mereka…

programme.title: Seri Ferry Mart - EP 5

programme.title: Mat Dan Kaki Jalan - EP 5

programme.title: Impiana S3 - EP 5

programme.title: Tersuka Tanpa Sengaja - EP 14

programme.title: Pengantin Lelaki Untuk Cik Gadis - EP 12

programme.title: Sejuta Rasa Buat Adelia - EP 5

programme.title: Kampung Boy S1 - EP 1

programme.title: Dee The Series - EP 9

programme.title: Karok La Kau! - EP 12

programme.title: Framed - EP 6

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: In rural India, an honest police officer takes on brutal caste crimes, risking his life and career as he challenges corruption, violence, and deep-rooted injustice. Release Year: 2019 Director: Anubhav Sinha Awards: Best Director Critics- Anubhav Sinha, Best Actor Critics- Ayushmann Khurrana

programme.title: Ek Aur Ek Gyarah
programme.desc: Two small-time thieves are forced into kidnapping a child to save someone they love, facing fear, guilt, and a desperate race to find a way out without harming anyone. Release Year: 2003 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Company
programme.desc: Chandu and Mallik team up to form a gang that quickly earns a reputation. But as egos clash and trust fades, tension builds, leading to betrayal and the gang's downfall. Release Year: 2002 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Gopi Kishan
programme.desc: A criminal uses an inept look-alike cop in a revenge scheme. Release Year: 1994 Director: Mukesh Duggal

programme.title: Time Story
programme.desc: A scientist invents a time-travelling gadget, leading to a battle between his son and his own evil twin brother.

programme.title: Dil Juunglee
programme.desc: The movie is a romantic comedy that displays the ups and downs in Sumit and Karol's relationship. Release Year: 2018 Director: Aleya Sen

programme.title: Cheeni Kum
programme.desc: Buddhadev Gupta Amitabh Bachchan, a 64-year-old chef in London, falls in love with Nina Verma Tabu, a woman 30 years his junior. Their unconventional romance faces societal challenges, especially from Nina's father, who is six years younger than Buddhadev. Release Year: 2007 Director: R. Balki Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Actor Female Critics - Tabu

programme.title: Jodi No.1
programme.desc: Partners in crime Jai and Veeru set their next target on a rich businessman, Rai Bahadur. Things turn hilarious when both of them fall for his daughters. Release Year: 2001 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Shaadi Se Pehle
programme.desc: Ashish is head over heels for Rani, but her parents aren't having it because he's unemployed. Everything changes when he lands a job, winning their approval at last! Release Year: 2006 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Badhaai Ho Badhaai
programme.desc: Anjali and Steven fall in love and elope. This brings an end to the friendship between the two families. Release Year: 2002 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Dil Juunglee
programme.desc: The movie is a romantic comedy that displays the ups and downs in Sumit and Karol's relationship. Release Year: 2018 Director: Aleya Sen

Their unconventional romance faces societal challenges, especially from Nina's father, who is six years younger than Buddhadev. Release Year: 2007 Director: R. programme.title: Chintu Ka Birthday
programme.desc: This film is set during the US invasion of Iraq where amidst all the danger, an Indian family awaiting its return to India struggles to celebrate the birthday of its youngest member. Release Year: 2019 Director: Devanshu Singh, Satyanshu Singh

programme.title: 14 Phere
programme.desc: Sanjay and Aditi, two individuals belonging to different castes, fall in love and wish to get married. However, knowing their parents will disapprove, they hatch a plan to convince them. Release Year: 2021 Director: Devanshu Singh

programme.title: Commando 2
programme.desc: A man uses his combat skills to eradicate black money, which has been siphoned to banks abroad.

programme.title: Mrs Chatterjee Vs Norway
programme.desc: Debika Chatterjee, an Indian woman living in Norway with her family, fights to regain custody of her children after Norwegian authorities take them away from her. Release Year: 2023 Director: Ashima Chibber

programme.title: Time Story
programme.desc: A scientist invents a time-travelling gadget, leading to a battle between his son and his own evil twin brother.

programme.title: Tara Vs Bilal
programme.desc: Bilal, a carefree man, lives an easy-going life in London and falls in love with Tara, a sensitive woman, but is unable to express his feelings to her.

programme.title: Anek
programme.desc: Madhu, an animator, gets thoughts about her past life, but her psychiatrist believes it to be a figment of her imagination. Madhu happens to meet Ashwin, the man she was in love with in her past life.

programme.title: Vicky Vidya Ka Woh Wala Video
programme.desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

programme.title: Param Sundari
programme.desc: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

programme.title: Tuesdays & Fridays
programme.desc: Two millennials get into a relationship where they are allowed to meet only on 'Tuesdays , Fridays'.

programme.title: Aankh Micholi
programme.desc: Three cousins, Laadli Chibber, Bajrang Das Khatri and Shikhar Randhawa, embrace the warmth of a new city when they move to Mumbai, but they also face challenges that transform their lives.

programme.title: Costao
programme.desc: In the 1990s, customs officer Costao Fernandes becomes a legend in Goa due to his bravery and tactics. His personal and professional life unravels when he kills a powerful drug lord in self-defence.

programme.title: Namastey London
programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.desc: Young couple Raghu and Zoya enjoy their lives together until a vertically challenged gang leader with harmful intentions turns their world upside down.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: This news programme chronicles the latest events, developments, inventions, discoveries and happenings around the world.

programme.title: Movie Contd - ALEX PANDIAN
programme.desc: Alex, a small-time thief, gets a contract to kidnap the chief minister's daughter, Divya, for three days. But when Divya reveals to him the real reason for her kidnap, he decides to help her.

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.title: VINODHINI
programme.desc: When her husband, a soldier, disappears in a military accident, Vinothini never loses hope, firmly believing he'll come back. Join her inspiring journey as she cares for his family & meets life's hardships as a single mother with resilience & love

programme.title: PUTHU VASANTHAM
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie- VALLAVANUKKU PULLUM AAYUDHAM
programme.desc: Sakthi befriends Vaanathi while travelling to his village to sell his ancestor's property. Little does he know that her father has been waiting for him to seek revenge for more than two decades.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: This news programme chronicles the latest events, developments, inventions, discoveries and happenings around the world.

programme.title: Movie contd -VALLAVANUKKU PULLUM AAYUDHAM
programme.desc: Sakthi befriends Vaanathi while travelling to his village to sell his ancestor's property. Little does he know that her father has been waiting for him to seek revenge for more than two decades.

programme.title: Chellame Chellame
programme.desc: Separated at birth, twins Kavin and Nila unknowingly meet at school, setting off truths that force their estranged parents, Vijayalakshmi and Vikram, to confront their forbidden marriage and the painful past that tore their family apart.

programme.title: Annam
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Annam, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Kayal
programme.desc: Abandoned by her father and coping with an alcoholic brother, Kayal works as a nurse to be her family's sole provider. She finds happiness in her sacrifice to meet the needs of her brother and sisters. Watch Kayal stand tall in her selfless journey.

programme.title: Marumagal
programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Moondru Mudichu
programme.desc: Nandini is a self-assured girl who puts her family’s happiness above hers. On the other hand Surya hates his mother due to lingering resentments and deliberately bonds with Nandini to cause strife. Watch what destiny has in store for Nandini & Surya.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: This news programme chronicles the latest events, developments, inventions, discoveries and happenings around the world.

programme.title: Singapenne
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Anandhi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: ETHIRNEECHAL THODARGIRADHU
programme.desc: Urged by her father, Janani is always a high achiever. But her marriage into a patriarchal family dashes her dream of a career. Thus begins Janani's arduous journey towards empowering her family's oppressed women to unleash their power.

programme.desc: Things take a momentous shift when a bold & loving village girl, Malli, crosses paths with a doting father and his 6-year-old daughter who yearns for a mother's love. Join the family's journey through the nuances of love, affection & parenthood.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 10
programme.desc: As Leon writes to Violette to try to persuade her to meet him, Julietta informs Ricardo that her biological father wants to get back in touch with him.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 15
programme.desc: Born in Antananarivo to Comorian parents, Moniri M'Bae grows up in Reunion Island, where he develops his passion for drawing. Trained at the Beaux-Arts, he publishes his first comics in ''Le Cri du Margouillat''. Today, he continues to create works inspired by his Creole culture.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 23
programme.desc: An ethical alternative project by LVMH, Nona Source is a resale platform for exceptional fabric. All about the origins of the Bateaux-Mouches. The T3 Architecture practice in Marseilles presents architectural design with an artisanal touch. The very feminine fashion style of the 1950s continues to inspire major designers.

programme.title: Un Soir... Un Train
programme.desc: Mathias, a linguistics professor at a Flemish university, is having an affair with Anne. When he has to travel far from home to give a lecture, Anne, to his great surprise, joins him on the train. But when he wakes up, the young woman has disappeared...

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Behind the steering wheel of a car, a young boy holds back his tears and his breath while a female voice speaks to him on the telephone. Based on a true story, the last 48 hours of the life of Marc-Antoine, aged 14, confronted by his urgent need for freedom.

programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.desc: Two inseparable friends died on the same day. A month later, a village woman who had been declared sterile, gave birth to twins, identical in every way to the two friends who had died.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 48
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 9
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 26
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 25
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

The prime suspect is none other than one of Nadia's clients.

programme.title: Le Code - EP 6
programme.desc: Nadia assists one of her clients, a prisoner determined at any cost to attend his aunt's burial. Idriss's health causes increasing concern but, against everyone's advice, he's determined to ensure the defence of a young client suffering from schizophrenia, accused of killing a neighbour living in the flat next door.

programme.title: Un Soir... Un Train
programme.desc: Mathias, a linguistics professor at a Flemish university, is having an affair with Anne. When he has to travel far from home to give a lecture, Anne, to his great surprise, joins him on the train. But when he wakes up, the young woman has disappeared...

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Behind the steering wheel of a car, a young boy holds back his tears and his breath while a female voice speaks to him on the telephone. Based on a true story, the last 48 hours of the life of Marc-Antoine, aged 14, confronted by his urgent need for freedom.

programme.title: Elles - EP 10
programme.desc: In Nairobi, Sarahmee learns to box with Sarah, a champion who founded Boxgirls Kenya to make girls stronger. She distributes sanitary products to women in need with the Her Light group and creates a scarf with the refugees of RefuSHE.

programme.title: Elles - EP 11
programme.desc: In Chiang Mai, Sarahmee takes a trip out with the women of the Karen community, who are achieving freedom thanks to their native skills. She meets Bhikkhuni Dhammananda, the first Thai woman ordained as a Buddhist monk, and learns about massotherapy with the ex-prisoners of the Lila Thai Massage group.

programme.title: Geopolitis
programme.desc: Analysis, explanations, neutrality... ''Geopolitis'' offers an unbiased in-depth look at international current affairs, with accuracy, precision and a constant desire to make an increasingly complex and conflictual world easier to understand.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Mise Au Point - EP 15
programme.desc: The best reports from ''Mise au Point'', the programme that takes a fresh look at national and international news events. Through its exclusive investigations and in-depth reports, ''Mise au Point'' tackles a wide range of topics: politics, economics, social issues, sports, culture and new trends.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 8
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde travels between two worlds: first, she discovers the Parisian effervescence and its decor trends before heading to the grandiose countryside of Beaujolais.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 13
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 14
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Dounia - EP 2
programme.desc: Dounia and her grandparents are gradually getting to know Canada, their new country. But for little Dounia, it isn't easy to get used to its seasons, food and language. She misses her father terribly. Fortunately her new friends rally round to help her make progress.

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 37
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 23
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 8
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 31
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 32
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 30
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 11
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 21
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 7
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Ma Vie Avec L'ia - EP 10
programme.desc: Theo, a teenager, questions artificial intelligence directly to try to understand it better. He wants to know what it is made of, what feeds it, and how it analyzes data.

programme.title: Femmes De Science - EP 6
programme.desc: Associate professor and astrophysicist, Lea Griton has been working, since her thesis, on preparing a mission to explore the planet Uranus.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Gotha
programme.desc: A general overview of European and world monarchies, through an issue of the moment, a particular focus, an encounter or a trend, plus one right royal question, asked by Ange-Victoria!

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera - EP 84
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 16
programme.desc: Born in Tunisia, Nadia Ounais has been passionate about diving and oceanography since childhood. After a brilliant career in biology and oceanology, she takes over the direction of the Oceanographic Institute of Monaco. Deeply attached to her native country, she participated in the renovation of the Salammbo aquarium.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 81
programme.desc: He's the player of the moment, surprise winner of the ATP Masters 1000 in Shanghai, Monegasque tennis player Valentin Vacherot and his coach Benjamin Balleret join Pierre Classen.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 3
programme.desc: Fashion, food, sport, urban culture, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the French touch. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets a new generation of creators and puts the spotlight on a bold and uninhibited French-speaking world.

programme.title: Hep Taxi ! - EP 16
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Refuges De Montagne - Hiver - EP 5
programme.desc: The Naues have settled into the Windegg: a group is expected before nightfall. Ursula and Ruedi Schranz witness a tragic accident at the top of the Piz Gluschaint. At the Lobhorn, Nepalese specialities are on the menu. Livia is homesick; Irene has to manage the Brunni on her own

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 2
programme.desc: We head off to the Fine Arts Museum in Libourne. Deep dive into sculptor Hugo Servanin's library of bodies and engineering laboratory. Danish designer Cecilie Bahnsen: combining Scandinavian pragmatism with French know-how. Discovery: digital light embroidery by Lou de Pray.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 17
programme.desc: On the menu: all-in-one lasagne soup, barley and halloumi cheese soup dish, Thai curry vegetable soup, onion and Quebec cheese soup.

programme.title: Parlons Eco - EP 8
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: La Boite A Secrets
programme.desc: We all have secrets that we keep buried deep inside us, kept in a box to which we alone have the key. They are so powerful, surprising or moving that we want to share them. What if we opened up the Pandora's box of three artists?

programme.title: Meurtres En Bearn
programme.desc: A woman is found drowned at the foot of the majestic mountains of the Bearn. Jeanne and Heloise head the investigation. Once close friends, today, as the respective mothers of a young couple torn by a bitter divorce, they hate one another. Somehow they'll have to put their feelings aside!

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 33
programme.desc: We look back at all the very best moments of the 2025/2026 season so far. An action-packed show filled with exciting Premier League programming and digital content.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 7
programme.desc: Over a nine season spell in the Premier League, Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink etched his name into footballing folklore as one of the most dynamic goalscorers in the competition's history. Fourth all time in Premier League goals for Chelsea, Hasselbaink's iconic freekicks and powerful finishes have seen him score some of the League's most memorable goals.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 34
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 44
programme.desc: With exclusive behind-the-scenes access, PL Stories spends time with Yakubu Aiyegbeni at Finchley Boxing Club, where he is forging a new path in the next chapter of his sporting life. We explore his growing passion for boxing and the discipline it demands, offering a fresh perspective on life after football. Alongside this new pursuit, Yakubu reflects on his remarkable journey from his early years in Nigeria to becoming one of the Premier League's most prolific and respected strikers.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2020/2021 (GB: KANE)
programme.desc: We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.

programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 23, starting with Saturday's early kick off with West Ham hosting Sunderland, Forest travel to Brentford, and finally Monday's game at Hill Dickinson Stadium, as Everton take on Leeds.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2016/2017 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 37
programme.desc: Andoni Iraola went from relative obscurity to leading a once relegation-threatened club to its highest ever points tally in the Premier League. We explore how his fearless philosophy, tactical innovation and emotional connection to the game have driven his teams to challenge expectations and rewrite their identity. A story of a Basque footballing icon, and his remarkable journey from Cyprus to the Premier League with Bournemouth in 5 years.

programme.desc: Matt Richie and Charlie Daniels are the guests for a special edition of PL Moments which discusses Bournemouth's rise from administration to the Premier League.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 18
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the best teams in Premier League history, we speak to the players who formed part of the Arsenal Invincibles of the 2003-04 season and hear about the behind the scenes stories and funny anecdotes from that unforgettable league win. With contributions from Thierry Henry, Patrick Vieira, Dennis Bergkamp, Freddie Ljungberg, Ray Parlour and Martin Keown.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 33
programme.desc: With 87 goals to his name Danny Welbeck is the fifth-highest goalscorer among active Premier League players, and across a career spanning 17 seasons he has seen it all. From his early days at Manchester United and being crowned champion in 2013, to his move to Arsenal where he overcame adversity, and now to his current role thriving as a leader for the Seagulls.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 34
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all of the highlights from BodogFIGHT season one showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Victor Ortiz
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Timothy Bradley vs. Luis Carlos Abregu
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a bout between 2 undefeated fighters, Timothy 'Desert Storm' Bradley (25-0, 11 KOs) vs. Luis Carlos Abregu, aka 'El Potro' (29-0, 23 KOs) from the Agua Caliente Casino, Rancho Mirage in California, USA on July 17, 2010.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Venice Qualifier tackle the Venice Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Rumbling Dice, Clear Climb and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Show 2 featuring Takakeisho, Mitakeumi, Shohozan and Meisei from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.desc: Featuring Boy's CMX Form and Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney World, Orlando, FL.

programme.desc: This episode follows former UFC welterweight champion Matt Serra around his hometown in New Jersey for a look at the lighter side of this intense competitor. programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about how the use of motion animation technology can help martial artists learn more efficient ways to put extra power behind their punches and kicks.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Dmitry Priog vs. Daniel Jacobs
programme.desc: This episode features a middleweight battle between Dmitry Priog and Daniel Jacobs that ends in a crushing overhand right, as well as kickboxing, sumo, weapons and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing Ricardo Mayorga in a light middleweight title fight, the first of two bouts between the two, that features an exciting last-minute finish. Also on the card, action from former champs Juan Manuel Marquez and Juan Diaz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Kotoyuki, Asanoyama, Aoiyama and Ryuden from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Rusty Derouen
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector 'Macho' Camacho (46-3-0, 20 KO) battles Rusty Derouen (33-6-0, 25 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from Erie, Pennsylvania, USA.

programme.title: WCCB Sebastian Fundora vs. Keith Thurman
programme.desc: LIVE March 29th from the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, 6'5" Sebastian Fundora, the WBC Super Welterweight World Champion, defends against former Welterweight World Champion Keith Thurman. programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 74
programme.desc: It's a windy day and the Teletubbies collect lots of leaves that have blown off the trees. The leaves go everywhere in Home Dome, so The Noo-­‐noo cleans up.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'mango' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of mangoes - a sweet mango, a juicy mango, a silly mango and even a mango doing a tango!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: When Mayor Oki wants to build a new tower, Messy is keen to help. There is just one problem - all his towers fall over...

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo's racer top speed to get his new plane off the ground. But when his flight goes wrong, Mojo and Bo have to take to the air in Mojo's jet top to help him down!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 30
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Mum, Dad, and Bingo must complete both their classes to pass swim school, but pleasing strict Big Fish instructor Margaret (aka Bluey) is proving to be very difficult.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 45
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: When a waved albatross snatches Mr Hammond's pocket bird guide book from Jen, it's up to Andy to find it and bring it home.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing hide-and-seek, but they can't find Happy. The squirrels follow lots of different footprints that take them to their friend but there is one set they can't work out.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch discovers his Halloween pumpkin isn't as big as the Grimbots' one, he goes in search of some fertilizer to help it grow.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: The team race to save Glitch when his kite flies too close to the academy's windfarm.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 1
programme.desc: Bulgy thinks that people should travel by bus instead of rail, that is until he tries carrying all their passengers.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: The Shallots want to explore beyond the front garden, so Sarah comes up with a plan.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Sarah's hoping for a nice quiet birthday, but there's no chance once her friends arrive.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: The circus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: Stanley has to free Myrtle, who is stuck, using his new tunnelling mole machine so she can attend the schools tree planting day.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: From tickles and piggybacks to no longer being able to do cartwheels, grandparents are brilliant!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 28
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are at the concert hall to hear some very special Captain Chloe music.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 28
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but where's all the food?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.desc: There's trouble erupting for the Go Jetters as Glitch disturbs an underwater volcano...

programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, Parsley sings a rock song.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Pepper performs a bell ringing act.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 31

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'digger' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of diggers - a big digger, a small digger, a dumping digger and a really muddy digger!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Messy travels with Zoe and Felix to the Okido launderette and learns just how much soap is too much.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 20
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19

programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 6

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: While helping Lola pack for her first day of camp, the Dews get stuck inside her backpack! Using the random items inside, the Dews get crafty in their attempt to break out. / When Eden and Phoebe join Harper and Marcus for a playdate, the Dews disagree on what activity their kids should do, ultimately learning that there are lots of ways to play!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Gabby brings DJ Catnip a microphone for him to use in the big music show, but he has some terrible news: he lost his groove! Determined to help him get his groove back, Gabby and Pandy take him on a musical search through the dollhouse. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Gabby sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden. With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 49
programme.desc: Tired of settling disputes between Valleyites, Grug invents "Chance," a two-sided rock that can be flipped to determine all decisions in the Valley; In a nature documentary-style, Thunk tells the story of Beary, a peaceful Thunk-like cub that struggles to fit into a violent bear owl culture

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 50
programme.desc: After being called out for having commitment issues by Grug, Gran decides to make the ultimate commitment: marrying Mow!; After embarrassingly choking at the prior Valley's "beastie Pageant", Eep asks previous winner Gran to train her to be the best

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 55
programme.desc: It's a turf war when Bounce House Bruiser Baby encroaches on Delivery Baby's tricycle park! Tina attempts to befriend Bruiser in order to woo her back to the bounce house, but naughty behavior is the only language Bruiser understands. Determined to win this kid over, Tina ends up going rogue as a trike hoodlum, and her own field team is forced to reign her in.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 56
programme.desc: Boss takes an overdue vacation day, and ends up teaching Tabitha the value of "trading up" valueless objects into something she actually wants, an electric scooter. However, a 5%er baby is in trouble and BB's field team has "got it under control"… or do they? Boss tries to juggle his Tabitha lessons with sneaking peeks at the mission in progress

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: When a new dragon is found in Edge Cove, the Dragon Riders must help the Sea Shocker escape a group of hungry Scauldrons

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: When the Skrill returns with a vendetta against Hiccup and Toothless, the Dragon Riders must choose a new course of action to stop the vicious dragon

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: In order to spice up their field trip to Romeinday (an ancient Rome reenactment park), George and Harold trick Melvin into turning the bus into a time machine so they can travel to actual ancient Rome and be gladiators. After offending Caesar with their comic, the emperor is accidentally turned into Cruelius Sneezer and pursues the school group with all his might.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: When General Morando and Colonel Kubritz attack the Mothership, Team Tarron must fight to protect the King and Queen’s Cores and their lives… with shocking, fatal results.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando - and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 67
programme.desc: JJ reluctantly lets Tina take over her assistant duties for the day, but a Tina slip-up leads to an outbreak of town adults drinking diluted special formula that makes them all baby-brained. When JJ discovers this, she works with R & D Baby Simmons and Security Baby Katja to antidote the wobbling "Adult Babies" before Tina can find out and blame herself.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 68
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina’s startup company for exploding baby Iggy’s favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press. As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp’s current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 69
programme.desc: On the hottest week of the year and a miserable time for babies, Boss and Tim infiltrates a country club with a very cool splash pad in order to find some way around their strict "no-babies" policy. Meanwhile, Banker Baby Benny visits the startup company to check on his investment. Tina has to cover up how the heat has split her coworkers into lawless factions fighting over a fan and a mist cooler.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 68
programme.desc: After the PALs encourage Maricela to make new friends, she forms the exclusive "Poshy Posse" with Priya, Sahir and Alex.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 69
programme.desc: Someone stole Bebe's gavel and used it to break a window at the academy! Everyone seems to suspect Alex ... but Pru is certain he's innocent.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 70
programme.desc: A swift new recruit joins the school racing team, putting Lucky's dreams of riding out front in jeopardy. Pru and Abigail clash over a class project.

programme.desc: When Eep and the others try to intervene with Thunk and Blurg's first date, they decide to run away so they can live happily ever after; Snoot and Ugga race each other to get to the Doomsday Skunkguin but are forced to put their differences aside once the weirder animals come out to hunt them down

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 48
programme.desc: When Eep is kicked out of Thunk's new imaginary role-playing adventure game she decides to play her own, real version of the game; Fed up with Squawk's mean teaching style, Eep has Grug fire him and replace him with Rad, the quintessential young, cool teacher

programme.desc: When Ruffnut is captured by Dragon Hunters, it's up to Astrid and Tuffnut to defend Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army

programme.desc: The crew meets their blue-hued doppelgängers when they crash-land on an alien planet where kids call all the shots.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: You see there was time when Vulture was not bald. Oh no, Vulture's head was covered in a beautiful crown of golden plumage! Vain Vulture never shut up about her golden feathers and was obsessed about making them ‘as golden as the sun!'. One day Vulture decides to fly up to the sun, but her precious feathers get burnt! Vulture decides to sooth her smoking feathers with golden honey which she steals from the bees. The bees are not pleased and Vulture sticks her head down Aardvark's burrow.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Giraffe didn't have a long neck. Her neck was all short and stumpy and she was a very delicate eater. All the food in Tinga Tinga seemed to make her tummy go funny. Then one day Lion suggests she try some honey. With the Bees permission, Giraffe tries to lick the honey… but it is deep, deep inside the tree.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Big Chris has got a new gadget to monitor the cars. He puts it to the test, what could possibly go wrong?!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: Big Chris is furious when Marsha tidies up his workshop - how's he supposed to work in these conditions? Luckily Flash saves helps out by messing it up again!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: Conrod is having an engine tune up at Silver Hatch. He boasts that his spoilers make him faster than all the other cars… who then want to be just as fast as their V8 hero…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with Roary and Maxi constantly bickering about who is the fastest car at Silver Hatch. He decrees that the pair will have a race, and whoever wins, is the fastest - no more arguing!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 41

programme.desc: In hopes of raising their grades so they can go to Lake Summer Camp, George and Harold must teach Ratrick, their assigned rat, a simple task. It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.desc: After getting hit on the head, Eep has a vision and sets out to get the Valley to show how thankful they are; Grug feels like he's the biggest joke in Ahhh Valley, so he asks Thunk to make a "buy-o-pic" of him to show people just how truly great he is

programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, Andre and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains’ is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, "CNBC Meets" is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: BP Ultimate Rally Raid Portugal

programme.title: Alula Tour 2026
programme.desc: Jonathan Milan and Tim Merlier, the two standout sprinters of the 2025 Tour de France, go head-to-head at the sixth edition of the AlUla Tour. For the first time, the 2026 Saudi race is classified in the UCI ProSeries category.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 4 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 69
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Scoop 2026

programme.title: Food Mister

programme.title: Big Big Home

programme.desc: Teenagers are keen on trends. Stepping into the era of technology, they are particularly interested in emerging electronic products and popular media. Our hosts collect the newest information from all over the world, sharing their discoveries with viewers each week.

programme.desc: The fourth season of this popular cross-regional music talent contest designed for adults aged 35 and above expands global recruitment, welcoming contestants from Hong Kong, Macao, mainland China, North America, Singapore, Malaysia and Australia.
